title: tpm_rc_name doesn't resolve FMT1-qualified codes: bare hex in error messages
description: wolfTPM commonly returns FMT1-qualified return codes (bit 7 set, with P-flag and subject-number modifier bits). E.g. TPM_RC_ATTRIBUTES with session_1 qualifier = 0x0182. Error::check() passes this as-is to TpmRc, and tpm_rc_name(0x0182) returns None (only base codes 0x0081-0x00a7 are in the match table). User sees 'TPM error 0x00000182' with no symbolic name. The fix: in tpm_rc_name or TpmRc::Display, strip FMT1 modifier bits (mask 0x0F40) when bit 7 is set and bits 15:12 are clear before doing the lookup, then show both the full code and the resolved base name.
